programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A couple are sued by their baby's biological father for custody after a fertility clinic mix-up; since family court cases are solely decided by a judge, Bull and Benny think about the best strategy to use since they can't analyze a jury.

programme.title: Bull

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Troy investigates a wildlife crime; a car and a body are found in a river.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Source Code

programme.title: Red
programme.desc: A group of retired secret agents reunite when they are targeted by mysterious assassins.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: The memories and skills of a deceased CIA agent are implanted into a dangerous convict.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: As a mercenary, John Seeger (Steven Seagal) has a reputation that precedes him. That's why he's being blackmailed into performing a risky job: breaking the son of a wealthy arms dealer out of a South African prison. With his friends taken hostage, Seeger agrees to do the deed -- but finds out too late that he's been double-crossed. Not one who likes being taken for a fool, Seeger hatches an elaborate plan to get even that will make the prison break look like capture the flag.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Killing Season
programme.desc: Oscar winner Robert De Niro ("Raging Bull") and Oscar nominee John Travolta ("Pulp Fiction") star as two Bosnian War veterans hunting each other in this thrilling game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: Odessa Carter (Whoopi Goldberg) needs to get to work as a nanny in the home of the affluent Miriam Thompson (Sissy Spacek), but she refuses to take the bus. Odessa is participating in the Montgomery bus boycott, protesting against the inequality between blacks and whites, so Miriam decides to offer Odessa a ride to work every day. Though the community and Miriam's husband (Dwight Schultz) insist she not get involved, the relationship between Miriam and Odessa has already changed for the better.

programme.title: Homefront
programme.desc: A former DEA agent moves his family to a quiet town, where he soon tangles with a local meth druglord.

programme.title: The Gunman
programme.desc: A sniper on a mercenary assassination team kills the minister of mines of the Congo. Terrier's successful kill shot forces him into hiding. Returning to the Congo years later, he becomes the target of a hit squad himself.

programme.title: The Gunman
programme.desc: A sniper on a mercenary assassination team kills the minister of mines of the Congo. Terrier's successful kill shot forces him into hiding. Returning to the Congo years later, he becomes the target of a hit squad himself.

programme.title: Before the Devil Knows You're Dead
programme.desc: When two brothers organize the robbery of their parents' jewelry store the job goes horribly wrong, triggering a series of events that sends them, their father and one brother's wife barreling towards a shattering climax.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Powerful story about three brothers struggling to stay together and the woman who comes between them.

programme.title: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Craig Sheffer and Brad Pitt star as two brothers who rebel against their stern father and become men in the majesty of the Montana wilderness.

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: As one of the last "natural" beings born into a genetically engineered world, Vincent Freeman (Ethan Hawke) has none of the "pre-ordered" DNA that will guarantee him success. Desperate to realize his dream of exploring space, Vincent assumes the identity of a genetically superior athlete s genetic markers, Vincent becomes a rising star at Gattaca Aerospace, attracting the attention of a stunning co-worker (Uma Thurman). But when a flight director is brutally murdered, a clue left at the crime scene threatens to shatter Vincent s plans in this riveting sci-fi classic.

programme.title: Cold Comes The Night
programme.desc: CHLOE (Alice Eve), a struggling motel owner and her daughter SOPHIA are taken hostage by TOPO (Bryan Cranston), a nearly blind career criminal as he attempts to retrieve his cash package from corrupt cop, BILLY (Logan Marshall-Green). Hoping to escape to a better life, Chloe tries to strike a deal with Topo but soon finds herself in over her head, and a series of double crosses leaves a cloud of mayhem and murder.

programme.title: A Man For All Seasons
programme.desc: Dramatic depiction of the conflict between Henry VIII and Sir Thomas More. Winner of six Oscars, including Best Picture (1966), best director (Fred Zinnemann), and best actor (Paul Scofield).

programme.desc: A telephone company repairman fixes up a system that brings race-results from far away tracks leading to corruption, power and murder.

programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.desc: A low-level drug dealer joins forces with an ambitious cop to bring down a psychotic cartel kingpin.

programme.desc: A former soldier is recruited for his toughest mission yet -- teaching a class of teen delinquents. As he kicks his way into their school and home lives, it becomes clear that his unconventional teaching style might be just what they need.

programme.desc: A maverick commander and a young general join forces to battle pirates who pillage small villages in 16th-century China. The violent clash of wits and weapons will ultimately decide who rules the land.

programme.desc: Olivia will do anything to keep the baby that she carried.

programme.desc: Kidnapped at birth by a woman she grew up believing was her mother

programme.desc: Jessica discovers that her son's biological father is her fertility doctor.

programme.desc: A local mom’s and dad’s group clash for the prestigious Modern Parenting Group of the Year award.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Tiny’s bar will close unless he pays $17K; customers rally to save it. Meanwhile, Jay’s hazing alarms.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Alan handles Women’s Lit as Tiny’s Place plan is approved.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Former Marine John "Falcon" Chapman is a dark anti-hero driven by guilt and suffering from PTSD, who will destroy himself unless given something else to destroy - a useful weapon-of-last-resort for the U.S. State Department.

programme.title: Murder Without Motive
programme.desc: Edmund Perry has everything going for him after he graduates with a scholarship to attend Stanford. With his dedication paying off, an encounter with a police officer senselessly ends his life.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Duke Diver is living the high life as the freewheeling manager of a luxurious resort in Palm Springs, Calif. He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: Wish
programme.desc: Wish is a beautiful, confident, woman, who makes no apologies for who she is and what she does. Very sexually free, Wish goes after what she wants. If she feels like making out with a total stranger, she will. If she feels like bringing home the waitress, she will, and she will do it with the ruthlessness of a man, but with the finesse of a woman. Wish is a force to be reckoned with, until one day she meets a woman who turns her world upside down, and nothing will ever be the same.

programme.title: The Calling
programme.desc: Tamar has been called to become a minister, and for most, this would be an honorable moment, but for Tamar, it is the worst thing that could happen. Tamar is the daughter of prominent Deacon Jessup, and is a lesbian. Taught that her desires are not that of God, Tamar has suppressed them for the last 16 years and has never dated a woman. When the Future Minister’s Ministry opens for a new class, Tamar finds herself falling for the only other woman in the class.

programme.title: Code of Envy
programme.desc: Mariah is living a truly fulfilling life with her husband and two best friends. One night, she runs into her old friend Neveah. After taking pity on her and her current circumstance, Neveah leeches onto Mariah and her life, sparking Nevaeh's jealousy and transforming her into the dangerous alter ego, Envy, endangering their friendship and lives.

programme.title: Room Available
programme.desc: When Emily rents a room from a seemingly kind landlord, she discovers his house hides deadly secrets — including past tenants, jealous lovers, and a dark obsession that may cost her life.
The 13th year of the new millenium brings a 13th month, and with it unlocks the gates from hell.

programme.title: The Exorcists
programme.desc: When his child is possessed by an unrelenting evil, a father hires three expert exorcists to purge the demon.
Parents, concerned about their son’s violent behavior, learn that their son is the gateway to the apocalypse.

programme.title: Evil Born AKA 12/12/12
programme.desc: A new mother learns that her infant son is the spawn of Satan, following a series of mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Death Valley: The Revenge of Bloody Bill
programme.desc: A group of college students must destroy an undead monster or be doomed to serve in his army of living dead.

programme.title: Conquest -
programme.desc: A young man, armed with a magical bow and arrows, embarks on a mystical journey through a mystical land to rid it of all evil and joins forces with an outlaw to take down an evil witch bent on claiming the magic bow for evil.

programme.title: Hatchet II: Unrated (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Victor Crowley lives in this follow-up to Adams Greens Hatchet. The quiet but hot-tempered heroine Marybeth (Danielle Harris, Halloween) barely escapes from the clutches of the mysterious Crowley (Kane Hodder, Friday The 13th), who has already has murdered all of Marybeths friends and other vacationers in the New Orleans swamp country. Marybeth recruits a team of hired guns and returns to the bayou to exact her revenge, but quickly discovers that even with an army of hunters at her side, the murderous fury of Crowley cannot be contained. Ultimately, it will be up to Marybeth alone to defeat the seemingly indestructible Crowley, but not before learning the truth about a twisted secret he shares with her own family!Filled with buckets of giddily over-the-top blood 'n' guts (The Hollywood Reporter), not to mention a funky, frisky sense of humor (The Onion AV Club), the unrated Hatchet II serves up a ferocious and furious dose of splatterific entertainment.just like in old days!

programme.title: The Bride with White Hair II
programme.desc: On Kit and Lyre's wedding night, Lien Ni-Chang, the bride with white hair kidnaps Lyre and takes her to her harem of fighting women to indoctrinate her against Kit. Kit tries to lead a rescue party and go up against the formidable enemies.

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leeches
programme.desc: Massive bloodsucking monsters are at large in this Drive-in schlock classic from producers Roger and Gene Corman. The legendary Yvette Vickers (Attack of the 50-foot Woman) stars along with Jan Shepard, Ken Clark, and some nasty giant leeches! Basically, they're just a bunch of actors in plastic costumes, but director Bernard Kowalski (Hot Car Girl, Night of the Blood Beast) made the most of his small budget. When the Cormans wouldn't hire a crew to push the camera raft while filming water scenes in the Pasadena Arboretum, Kowalski put on a bathing suit and did it himself!

programme.title: Zombie
programme.desc: In Italy, it was considered the sequel to Dawn Of The Dead. In America, it was called ZOMBIE and advertised with the tag line We Are Going To Eat You! Tisa Farrow, Ian McCulloch, Al Cliver, and Richard Johnson star in this worldwide splatter sensation directed by Maestro Of Gore Lucio Fulci that remains one of the most eye-skewering, skin-ripping, gore-gushingly graphic horror hits of all time!

programme.title: Clovehitch Killer, The
programme.desc: A picture-perfect family is shattered when the work of a serial killer hits too close to home. Dylan McDermott stars in this chilling portrait of all-American evil.

programme.title: Who Invited Them
programme.desc: A mysterious couple lingers after the other guests have left a housewarming party. The hosts start to suspect their new friends are actually duplicitous strangers with a dark secret.

programme.title: Crowsnest
programme.desc: Five young friends on a road trip are terrorized by nomadic cannibals in a huge RV. The video they recorded is discovered by police as evidence in their still-unsolved murders.

programme.title: Sissy
programme.desc: Invited away on a hen's weekend, Sissy is stuck in a remote cabin with her high school bully...and a taste for revenge. #triggered

programme.title: Queer For Fear
programme.desc: Queer gothic writers Mary Shelley, Oscar Wilde and Bram Stoker invent the horror genre with masterpieces Frankenstein, The Picture of Dorian Gray and Dracula.

programme.title: Queer For Fear
programme.desc: Legendary gay director James Whale makes four classics for Universal that paved the way for all Hollywood horror movies after; FRANKENSTEIN, THE OLD DARK HOUSE, THE INVISIBLE MAN and THE BRIDE OF FRANKENSTEIN.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

The Reno gang includes a beautiful young woman (Mala Powers), who catches Barlows eye. This western from director Tim Whelan (The Thief of Bagdad) features cinematography by two-time Oscar winner Ray Rennahan (Gone With The Wind), while the screenplay was by noted author Horace McCoy (They Shoot Horses, Dont They?). Theres also an all-star cast, including Forrest Tucker, J. Carrol Naish, Edgar Buchanan, Denver Pyle, and several other shaggy sidewinders!

programme.title: Raiders of Old California

Gannaway (The Badge of Marshall Brennan) directs an all-star cast including Jim Davis (Jock Ewing of Dallas), Arleen Whelan (Young Mr. Lincoln) and Lee Van Cleef (The Good, The Bad, and the Ugly). Also, look for appearances by legendary country & western stars Marty Robbins and Faron Young.

programme.title: Brothers of the West
programme.desc: Tom Tyler plays Tom Wade, a range detective whose brother has been accused of robbery and murder. Wade has only one clue to prove his brothers innocence: a set of unusual tire tracks. This film was directed by Sam Katzman, who later became known as Jungle Sam for his association with a variety of jungle thrillers, and then as a master of all exploitation genres, from teen horror to flying saucer flicks!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it’s explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I’m shaking because it’s Poland, it’s powerful, it’s strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it’s about to get heavy.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: It’s time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Part 2 of the World Finals of the Strongman Champions League tour 2023 at the Sarajevo Centar Skenderija in Bosnia. 3 Events was done already and amazing results have been set. Who will be the new World champion? Find out here, who, after 16 stages, will be crowned World Champion 2023.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly embraces fall with a recipe for Pumpkin Spice Muffins that double as cupcakes when topped with frosting. While the treats bake, the hosts debate whether muffins belong at breakfast or dessert and share their absolute worst live television disasters including Michael cooking during an active fire and Clinton slicing his finger on live TV.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: In this episode of Chewed Up Show, hosts Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon transform rotisserie chicken into Buffalo Chicken Cornbread Melts, the grand finale of Leftover Chicken Week. Carla Hall shares her kitchen genius by combining hot sauce, butter, and shredded rotisserie chicken with a crisp celery blue cheese slaw, served on toasted cornbread rectangles. The hosts discuss ingredient swaps, blue cheese preferences, and techniques for mellowing raw onions. The episode showcases how classic wing flavors elevate simple leftovers into an elegant, less-messy alternative to traditional buffalo wings. The hosts also engage with fan mail, discussing rice rinsing preferences and brainstorming potential spin-off show concepts.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Chewed Up Compilation #2: BLOOPERS showcases the funniest and most unexpected moments from season four. Clinton accidentally consumes a THC-infused beverage before reading fan mail, Michael passionately debates whether air fryers are just convection ovens and defends wood cutting boards, and Carla reveals her unconventional Christmas card habits. The episode features heated discussions about bagel varieties, seed oils, Instagram fitness culture, and holiday movie preferences. The climax occurs during a butter cookie demonstration when a frozen egg yolk refuses to incorporate and a pastry bag catastrophically fails on camera, turning an otherwise polished cooking segment into comedic chaos.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In this Simply Symons episode, hosts Michael and Liz Symon, alongside Liv Annacone, prepare a summer-inspired dish featuring seared halloumi cheese topped with warm strawberries, fresh mint, pistachios, and a red wine vinaigrette infused with honey and cracked black pepper. Liz creates a homemade strawberry simple syrup using fresh and frozen strawberries, which becomes the base for a refreshing strawberry vodka martini garnished with mint. The hosts discuss the unique properties of halloumi—a Cypriot cheese that doesn't melt and develops a savory crust when seared—and explore the classic pairing of sweet and salty flavors. They also share storage tips for fresh herbs and berries, mention the superior quality of local Harry's berries, and discuss favorite summer TV shows.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly elevates lunchtime with savory French Onion Soup Tartines, topped with melted Gruyere. While the onions caramelize, the trio discusses their love for French food, debates the perfect early dinner time for getting older, and shares hilarious stories about awkward fan encounters including the time a woman on a crowded train told Clinton he looked "so much fatter in person".

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Michael Symon is baking up a batch of his famous brown butter bittersweet chocolate chip cookies. While the cookies bake, the hosts hilariously debate the size of Michael's head, share the secret to always having warm cookies ready, and Clinton confesses his crush on former NPR host David Greene. The episode wraps up with a Frontgate apron giveaway and plenty of sweet, chaotic banter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes a quick, "uptown trashy" appetizer: Deviled Cheese Toast. While baking the cheesy, pickle-studded baguette slices, the hosts discuss nostalgic white bread, launch their interactive "Fan Fridge" segment, and go on a passionate rant against celebrities who lie about taking weight-loss injections.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts welcome their first guest, Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja. Michael Symon prepares crispy Beef Kefta, while Ayesha whips up her famous Whipped Feta. Ayesha shares the inspiring story of how she broke into the restaurant industry by sweeping floors, and the group dishes on the intense reality of competing on Bobby Flay's Titans.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja sticks around for a hilarious Friday dessert episode as Carla Hall bakes her portable Sweet Potato Cobbler Bars. The group shares funny stories about accidentally cursing in front of kids, debates the most overrated desserts, and reveals the secret ingredients their grandmothers used to make their family recipes so special.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly attempts to make a viral "Croffle" (croissant waffle) out of puff pastry, but chaos ensues when he messes up the first try. Pivoting quickly, he serves it up as a warm dessert with ice cream and chocolate syrup. The hosts hilariously discuss the realities of aging and male menopause.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest chef Christian Petroni brings his energy to the kitchen to cook Rigatoni Alla Vodka except he swaps the vodka for red wine. The crew debates "sauce versus gravy," discusses the proper saltiness of pasta water, and reveals the foods they absolutely despise. The episode ends with a giveaway of Christian's cookbook.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Halloween season, and Carla Hall is making her Banana Pudding Trifle in portable mason jars. She skips the traditional Nilla wafers for buttery Chessmen cookies to keep the crunch. The hosts chat about their favorite Halloween costumes, debate the merits of kitchen gadgets, and deal with Michael's impatience over Carla's loud mixer.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The Halloween celebrations kick off with guest Jeanette Donnarumma, former culinary producer for The Rachael Ray Show. Clinton Kelly attempts a spooky "Cheese Rat" appetizer made from cream cheese, curry powder, and mango chutney. The group laughs at the questionable rat shape, shares TV producer behind-the-scenes stories, and Jeanette shakes up an Apple Cider Margarita spritz.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's cozy comfort food season as Michael Symon cooks a hearty Beef and Butternut Squash Stew. While the meat braises, the hosts share their favorite podcasts to listen to while doing chores, universally bash the idea of the "Turducken", and discuss the possibility of a future Chewed Up cookbook.

programme.title: What To Cook Next
programme.desc: Nico prepares kinilaw with scallop (or oyster) and a bright mango-tomato salad, showing how acid, freshness, and restraint define Filipino raw dishes.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind the Counter - The Vegan Korean Menu: This week, Dave is developing a vegan Korean menu for guests Nikki Glaser and Pete Holmes. Dishes include: Banchan, the Korean name for side dishes served with rice; fried mushroom Tangsuyuk; crispy bindaetteok cones; avocado rice; kongguksu; and Asian pear shaved ice.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave makes a quick snack that you might see more and more often in the coming years: dried squid. He talks about the rising amount of cephalopods in the ocean, the specific umami and texture of squid, and ponders if it might be coming to more and more grocery store shelves near you. He also answers an Ask Dave about London eating, and general dining strategy when on a short trip in a new place.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind the Counter with David Chang - A Little Bit of Everything: An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. This episode sees Dave working on "A Little Bit of Everything" menu for comedian Jay Pharoah and rapper Lil Jon. Dishes include: Tempura Rock Shimp with Salsa Seca, Everything Bagel-Spice Flatbread, and Boiled Chicken Two Ways.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind the Counter with David Chang - Classic Comforts: An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. This episode sees Dave working on a "Classic Comfort Foods" menu for NBA legends Reggie Miller and Mark Jackson. Dishes include: Caesar salad, New England clam chowder, fettuccine alfredo, salmon with caper-butter sauce, a potato rösti, and a chocolate tart.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind the Counter with David Chang - Fish on the Menu: An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. In this episode, Dave is creating a "Fish on the Menu" theme for Emily in Paris stars Lily Collins and Ashley Park. Dishes include: Hwe (two ways), Uni & Chickpeas, an Ode to Noma's Langoustine, Roasted Flounder, Fish Soup with Rice and Pickles, and Flottante.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "McDonald's General Tso's Chicken" - Chris Ying has seen all of the McDonald's "hacks" that are floating around social media, and he's calling BS. Most of these don't even qualify as actual hacks, so he takes matters into his own hands and concocts a clever dish using Chicken McNuggets, Sweet & Sour sauce, ketchup, (and a few other things you'd have in your kitchen) to truly upgrade your McDonald's meal.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "Chris Ying's Family Curry Recipe with Twice-Fried Potatoes, Chicken, and Roux-Thickened Coconut Milk" - It's Chris Ying's favorite dish on earth. His last-request meal. It's his dad's curry: a version of Macanese (as in, from Macao) Chicken: a roux-thickened coconut curry full of twice-fried potatoes and fried chicken thighs, flavored with ginger and Shaoxing wine. It's Chris's comfort food, which is fitting, since he's feeling a little emotionally battered as he makes it for us. Will the curry do its magic and pick him up? Only one way to find out!

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: There is nothing more delicious than butterflied poultry with super crispy chicken. In this episode, Lidia starts with a Spicy Butterflied Cornish Hen made with hot cherry peppers, rosemary and wine. She then pulls out the beer to add to her Potatoes Baked in Beer. Our favorite Grandma Erminia joins Lidia to taste the Squash and Ricotta Tart.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: It's all about family in this episode as Lidia shares three of her favorite family recipes. Marinated Meatballs, Zucchini Parmigiana, Artichoke Carbonara and Jam Filled Mezzaluna are the stars of this episode.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Everybody loves pasta! In this episode, Lidia starts with the simplest - a Spaghettini with Olive oil and Rosemary, then moves on to a hearty dish of Tagliatelle with Meatballs and Eggplant, and finishes with a delicious whole wheat pasta- Baked Whole Wheat Penne with Ceci Beans.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: It's another episode dedicated to simplicity and delicious ingredients. Here Lidia chooses three great dishes that can be made in very little time but offer great flavors and complexity. They are great as appetizers, sides or by themselves and include Caprese Salad with Celery and Walnuts, Stuffed Artichoke with Tuna and Scallop Salad.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Grilled lamb chops are always delicious, Lidia sears them in a heavy skillet, pressing them down so that all the surfaces get crisp. She serves the chops with a simple yet elegant red wine sauce made with dried cherries, garlic, bay leaves, and rosemary. Served with a Tasty Potato Salad and finished with beautiful Almond and Coffee Cream Mini Tarts, this is a meal that everyone will Love!

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Want to turn a veggie loather into a veggie lover? Ellie reveals some tantalizingly simple ways to reform veggie haters, in the kitchen and beyond. Recipes include Broccoli Pesto Pizzas, Beef and Mushroom Sloppy Joes, and Raw Brussel Slaw.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: You are what you eat and it shows. Ellie helps you feel and look your best with tasty dishes that nourish your skin. Recipes include Creamy curry dip, Green Tea Poached Salmon, Watermelon Salad, and Chai Fruit Compote.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie helps you get the bold taste you crave from your favorite foods while keeping salt in check in your kitchen. Recipes include 3-ingredient Coriander Crusted Turkey Breast, Sweet & Spicy Roasted Root Vegetable, Tri-Color Salad Pizza, and Family Favorite Minestrone Soup.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Raw foods are on hot now. But cooked foods have unique benefits too. Let Ellie suss out the facts from the hype for you. Recipes include Gazpacho, 3 Ingredient Tomato Sauce, Zucchini Carpaccio, and Wok Charred Lettuce with Shrimp.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This week we're helping a young family deck out their backyard to add some much-needed outdoor living space. The new wood deck we’re adding will connect two different access points from the house and transform the way the family uses their backyard

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: A young, growing family has a master bathroom that needs to grow too... but it can't, so we're making the most of what they have by updating the flooring, wall finishes and vanity. The changes not only update the space, they add necessary storage as well.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: The family room is one of the busiest in a home, so Chelsea wants to update hers for her family and her guests. The kids need storage space for their toys, but Chelsea wants to keep it out of sight so we’re creating built in shelving and cabinets to conceal them.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: When a first-time homeowner takes on a kitchen renovation and realizes she’s bitten off a little more than she can chew… Danny and Chelsea come alongside to help her tackle some flooring fixes, cabinet modifications and backsplash installation.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: People have lots of reasons to upgrade their garages. Most want more organized storage and a cleaner, more attractive space. These homeowners want all of those things, but they also need a suitable home for a fast and shiny member of the family

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: When you work from home, sometimes you have to be really creative about where and how you set up your office. These homeowners had to carve a corner out of the Master Closet so we’re helping the make it both a better closet and a better office.

programme.title: Music Voyager
programme.desc: Join Music Voyager in Florence and experience this famous city by both day and night, including a visit to the Ferragamo Museum. We will also tour the city of Lucca, the magnificent Cinque Terre, as well as the historic city of Siena.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: We wend our way across this largest island in the Mediterranean Sea. Once the hub of the ancient world, Sicily offers up a vibrant, sun-soaked brew of history, tradition, and intense cultural pride. A climb up Mount Etna for its unearthly views will delight.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: On the Greek Islands we get familiar with the ferries as we island-hop the Aegean. Sun-drenched, upscale, and exotic, Santorini sits on the rim of an ancient, still active, volcano. At one end of the island, the archaeological site at Akrotiri uncovers a city frozen in time by an ancient eruption.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Naples, Italy is the ideal launching point for exploring Italy's great historic treasures. Marvel at the ancient city of Pompeii, and the eerily captured devastation of Mount Vesuvius. Hop a ferry to the isle of Capri and drive the spectacular Amalfi Coast.

programme.title: Porthole Cruise and Travel Show
programme.desc: Set sail and cruise to the Mediterranean's top destinations in France and Italy.

programme.title: Traveling with Denella Ri'chard
programme.desc: Mediterranean with Denella Ri'chard.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane reveals the ancient grains that Greek cooks love to use. Learn how to make the classic Cretan Barley Rusk (twice baked bread) called Paximadi, as well as a savory pasta dish. Also, observe how trahana can transform a dish.

programme.title: Dream of Italy
programme.desc: We begin with a hike to find white truffles before attending the World Truffle Auction. We will also visit Cascina Bruciata vineyard, Lago delle Sorgenti for some deep relaxation, as well as Lake Iseo to witness fine Italian boat making.

programme.title: Dream of Italy
programme.desc: Author Frances Mayes and her husband Ed join Kathy in Cortona, Tuscany for a delightful visit that includes a rare tour of the couple's exquisite home, Villa Bramasole. Artisan, artistic, and culinary treasures await under the Tuscan sun.

programme.title: Dream of Italy
programme.desc: There is only one Venice. Join Kathy as she receives rowing lessons from an 8th-generation gondolier and learns how Venice is contending with rising sea levels. We will also meet an impiraressa and visit the ancient Rialto Market.

programme.title: Traveling with Denella Ri'chard
programme.desc: Mediterranean with Denella Ri'chard.

programme.title: Porthole Cruise and Travel Show
programme.desc: Set sail and cruise to the Mediterranean's top destinations in France and Italy.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: A Mediterranean marvel, Barcelona simmers with beautiful beaches, medieval mazes, eye popping art and hypnotic architecture. From tapas bars, to surrealist art, to Modernist structures, we will feast on Barcelona's delights.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: We leave the eternal city behind by way of the famous Appian Way to explore the environs of Rome. First it's the majesty of Emperor Hadrian's villa and the wine and lakes of the Alban Hills. Next, it's south to the ancient seaport of Ostia, Rome's Pompeii.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: We are off to the Italian Riviera seeking la dolce vita in one of the world's most romantic locations. With awe-inspiring cliffs, and beaches that shimmer like jewels on the Mediterranean, the Riviera is as stunning a coastline as anywhere in Europe.

programme.title: Around the World with Marlin Darrah
programme.desc: Your Mediterranean dream begins in Gibraltar and its stunning panoramic views. Revive your spirit in Carcassonne, Cannes, and Provence, France, and dream onward into Italy and explore Florence, Rome, and Venice. Finally, tour one of the most prominent vacation spots on the Mediterranean, Dubrovnik.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: The team are at the seaside resort of Ventnor. Under scrutiny is a family portrait showing a Speaker of the House of Commons as a young boy and 75 Austin vehicles.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel introduces a selection of unscreened finds. Items include an Edward VIII Coronation souvenir that was hastily converted to an abdication mug and early fan mail for Elton John.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: The Roadshow team head for Lancaster. Amongst the items uncovered in the Town Hall are a valuable pair of clogs, a moving series of letters from Crimea, an anti-slavery ring and a rare tapestry.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: At Coughton Court in Warwickshire, the team finds original designs from one of Britain's leading graphic artists, a bizarre Japanese depiction of skeletons dancing and a lost masterpiece.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Back at Coughton Court, the experts get excited about an Agatha Christie letter, a medal awarded to those who came to the aid of the Titanic survivors and a rare figure of the Queen on horseback.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: The team visits Sydney, Australia. Under scrutiny are pieces of furniture made by convicts, a part of the keel of Captain Cook's ship, and one collector receives one of the show's biggest valuations.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: The team heads to the Cathedral cloisters in Norwich. Amongst the items are a letter from Lord Nelson, a series of portraits, and correspondence from John Lennon's Aunt Mimi.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: We revisit the cloisters of Norwich Cathedral. The team uncovers original illustrations from Black Beauty and a rare saucer used for many years as an ashtray.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Batten down the hatches, open your umbrella, and get ready, because we're about to take you on one wild ride! Over the next half hour, you'll be pelted with hail, soaked by rain, and get blown away, as we showcase the most ferocious weather videos you've ever seen. Strap in, because it's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Rain. Snow. Lightning. Hurricanes. Dust devils. When these weather phenomena combine, it's usually a recipe for disaster. But on this show, it's just another normal day in the books. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Brace yourself for unpredictable dust devils, mind blowing lightning shows, and glass shattering hail storms!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: When the weather gets rough, the brave start recording. From raging hurricanes to devastating dust storms, it's time to watch as we showcase some of the wildest weather ever caught on film. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

And over the next half hour, we'll be bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera; from hailstorms to tornados and everything in between, we're going to show it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Buckle up, folks, because we're headed straight into the eye of the hurricane, the mouth of the volcano, and the depths of the flood, and we're doing it all right here, on another episode of Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Finny's First Sleepover - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: It’s Finny’s first sleepover and Finny is nervous to sleep at Myrtle the Turtle’s house. Throughout the night, Finny becomes more and more comfortable and after a spooky story, Finny becomes the bravest of everyone at the sleepover! Finny can't wait to do a sleepover again – but this time, at Finny’s house!

programme.title: When I Grow Up - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: What do you want to be when you grow up? Maybe a firefighter? Or an astronaut? Or maybe a dancer? Practice talking about jobs and careers with this super simple and super fun song, “When I Grow Up”.

programme.title: Enchanted Ice Cream - Super Simple
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Enchanted Ice Cream Sundaes! With a map in hand, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble search the orchard for the secret ingredient … and discover a fairy treehouse leading to an enchanted world! The Bumble Nums travel through the portal…but do they find the ingredient they’re looking for? And can they get it back to the kitchen in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Hello Hello! - Super Simple Puppets and more
programme.desc: Sing and dance along with the Super Simple Puppets to “Hello Hello!”! It’s a classic Super Simple action song for kids.

programme.title: Down By The Bay - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see cat wearing a hat? How about a goat rowing a boat? Well you can in this video for the classic children’s song, Down By The Bay!

programme.title: Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making an Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake but the secret ingredient is at the top of Mount Fruity Volcano! Can Humble, Grumble, and Stumble climb the volcano and get what they need before it blows? And can they do it in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Finny The Shark - Down In The Bay and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: Let's Go For A Drive! - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Get in on the fun and join Milo in his pretend car for a quick ride. Do you see the ducks crossing the road? How about people walking on the sidewalk? Wait, don't cross on a red light!

programme.title: Mr. Pig & Mr. Mouse Have A Mess On Their Hands - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mr. Mouse and Mr. Pig love making food and having their friends over to eat it. But afterwards, their house is a complete mess! It's so gross, they don't even want to drive their van home to clean up. How can Mr. Mouse and Mr. Pig share their love of food with their friends without cluttering their home? Mr. Monkey has a tasty idea! What is it? Watch and find out!

programme.title: The Pinocchio - Sing Along With Tobee - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Caitie made a fluffy bird marionette named Fifi! Fifi is full of jokes and Tobee can't stop laughing! Caitie knows another marionette who is just as silly as Fifi. It's Pinocchio! There's even a whole song about him called "The Pinocchio." After Caitie and Tobee sing and dance to the song, Fifi can't help but tell one last joke. And guess what? It quacks Tobee up!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Little Billy's Skateboard - Carl's Car Wash and more
programme.desc: The Bubblegum Bandit pulls another bubblegum burglary and is about to escape when Officer Oona bursts his bubble! Moments later, little Billy skates right into the action and his skateboard becomes a gummy mess! Billy hurries to Carl’s Car Wash, but Carl won't clean his skateboard - it's a CAR wash, not a SKATEBOARD wash! Billy does some quick thinking...and his skateboard might just go through the car wash after all!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: For Children's Day, Wang Min's Dad has invited his son and his classmates to visit his toy factory. While cleaning up before the visit, a robot toy goes on a rampage. The Super Pets encounter an itchy lion at a sanctuary in South Africa. Jett and Astra deliver a back scratcher, but the lion's itchiness is stronger than they realized!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets go into a video game arcade and play a video game called Dessert Kingdom. They are watched by a boy named Yoonho and they decide to go into the game itself. When the Super Pets unearth a woolly mammoth, a Nenets boy wants to keep it. The mammoth must be able to pull a sleigh so Jett and Dizzy deliver a mammoth size sleigh.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a T-Rex skeleton on display in a Copenhagen museum is brought to life, a boy orders a remote controller to summon a giant robot T-Rex that he built to help calm it. Jett and the others arrive in the Jurassic Period to return Tyranno to her proper place in time. A volcano erupts throwing fireballs everywhere and causing a dinosaur stampede.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets spend a day at a Pet Hotel in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. The daughter of the hotel owner gets help from the Super Wings to keep them well behaved. After the Jet Pets' Mini Base collides with a small comet, Jett and Astra rush a space scanner to a young boy and together and the three search space for the small 'Baba' comet.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: It's Jett's birthday and almost all of his friends are throwing him a big birthday party! Sky sends Donnie, Paul, and Dizzy out on missions and nobody is left at Jett's party. When the truck transporting race cars gets lost, Jett, Jerome and Dizzy show up in Monza, Italy to take part in a very special Super Wings race against Golden Boy.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: While in Thailand, Jett Pet and Paul Pet's fruit is swiped by a monkey. Thanawat asks for help getting his toys back so they create an LED ball with a tracking system. The Super Pets travel to Madrid, Spain where they help a boy secure a case for his pet tarantula to ride the train. However an accident causes his tarantula to become super-sized!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: After eating Super Pets' trick chocolates, Jett can only move very slowly. An emergency call comes in from a young girl in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, who needs an ice maker delivered. When the Super Pets discover an erupting underwater volcano, a girl orders a megaphone to alert all the villagers fishing in the water. However, they don't listen to her warnings.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets are on World Aircraft to help Jett give some kids a tour. After Storm demonstrates how the package printer works, two packages get mixed up. The Super Pets travel to Tokyo, Japan where they help the Paper Rangers repair an Origami Robot for an action movie. Afterward, they get asked to be ACTORS in the movie!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets encounter mermaid students learning to befriend fish in Cebu, Philippines. Jett and Jerome deliver a microphone and speaker to a girl who wants to sing with them. The Super Pets meet a girl in Paris whose greatest wish is to go to the top of the Eiffel Tower. The elevator cannot run due to an expected storm so Jett and Donnie deliver a tram.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Storm and Stella search for Jett and Donnie after the two Super Wings disappear in thin air. Astra locates their whereabouts - they're in Paris, 1889! While exploring Osaka, Japan, the Super Pets accidentally rip a boy's koinobori for the Children's Day Festival. Jett and Dizzy deliver a huge koinobori for him.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets meet a boy and his giant robot on Jeju Island in South Korea. Before a typhoon comes, Taehoon needs to help his father harvest all the tangerines on their farm. When a little girl and her Dad accidentally fall in an Incan secret dark room, Jett, and Ellie show up in Machu Picchu, Peru, to take part in a historical rescue mission.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When the Super Pets arrive at Ha Long, Vietnam, they meet a boy who wants to take his pet snail on a walk but the snail is too slow. So the boy asks for a snail size skateboard. The Super Pets go to Germany where they participate in a water fight. They accidentally shoot Mona's necklace. Jett and Astra deliver a magnifying glass to find the missing bead.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When the Super Pets accidentally break a boulder on the roof of a house in Monsanto, Portugal, a girl orders tape to stick it back together. Golden Boy tries to outshine them. The Super Pets' Mini Base accidentally gets tangled up in an octopus kite, pulling it to the ground and destroying it. The Super Wings deliver paper and string to make a new kite.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Marty, with their new electric powers, save an amusement park in Germany. Jett and Dizzy also rescue a boat, an eel, and fix a jaguar chase, making everyone happy.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Singapore, Jett and Lucie use electric powers to shrink Happy the giant robot dog. In Paris, Jett and Marty turn a giant baguette into a train to deliver it to a festival.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Traver time-travel to uncover a dinosaur footprint’s creator. Jett and Dizzy rescue a bus stuck in a ditch using Monster Truck Tires, getting the kids to school on time.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Tiki, and Taki recover stolen costumes to save a dragon dance in Sichuan. In Antalya, Jett and Marty protect a giant sandcastle after Golden Girl's magic enlarges it and Jett

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Enjoy the best of summer, autumn and winter with Baby Einstein! Discover the familiar sights and sounds of the different seasons. Learn names of common objects associated with each through repetition and narration and see engaging images of whimsical toys that celebrate each. Discover the magic of each season from falling leaves, rolling beach balls and even snowmen.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating animals from across the globe! Dance and sing along with puppets and discover some of the world's most unique creatures. Join us to dance along to classical melodies as we learn animal names through narration and repetition or simply enjoy seeing live-action footage.

programme.title: Dinobees Funny Cartoon Show for Kids
programme.desc: Welcome to #Dinobees, a funny show for kids. It revolves around a family that discovers and adopts three dinosaurs. This comedy cartoon is perfect entertainment for toddlers.Dinobees has some amazing 3d animations. programme.title: Luke and Lily Baby Shark - Shark Song For Kids

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: A female space hunter named Katella, who is capturing animals all over Mobius for a Zoo, teams up with Robotnik and captures Sonic. To Robotnik's great fear, she then plans to marry the eggman!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a giant AMNESIA RAY in his booby-trapped PINBALL FORTRESS (based on the Sonic game per Roger Hector) in order to erase the bad memories the Mobius citizens have of him, and make them think he's a great guy.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik decides to cripple Mobius' three major transit systems: Rail, Air, and Sea in order to fully gain control of the planet. Sonic has to circumnavigate the planet in order to save the day.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails help out an Owl/Chilidog Diner owner, named Bert Whoo, when Robotnik uses his henchbots to try to collect protection money. When the henchbots prove to be no match for Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Coconuts inadvertantly creates a "super power" formula, when his janitor bucket spills in the lab. Robotnik falls into it and becomes "Super Robotnik", then challenges Sonic to a fight, with all of Mobius as the stakes. With Prof. Von...

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff "unworthy".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Professor Von Schlemmer (from Too Tall Tails) has created a machine which brings dreams to life. When Robotnik hears about it, he forces the Professor to alter the machine so that nightmares come to life.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a Brain Evolution Achievement Negatizer, or B.E.A.N., in order to make all of Mobius stupid. But instead of turning Sonic and Tails into dummies, the BEAN device turns them into three year old babies!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his "brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer" to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver).

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Momma escapes again from the Mobius Home for Really Bizarre People, disowns Robotnik for failing to capture Sonic, then with the help of an obscure Mobius law, adopts Sonic!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outerspace to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When a Rebel Base is threatened by Robotnik, Sonic and Tails team up with Big Mike and Da Bears to run a booby-trapped gauntlet in their gigantic Road Warrior-like truck.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. programme.desc: In a raging war for control of Earth, occupying forces buzz.

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: After nearly 500 years, French is still the official language of this North American city. How has this UNESCO World Heritage Site retained its Frenchness after all this time? Why does the Chteau Frontenac hotel look like a French castle, and what does it have to do with the Canadian railway? Whats so curious about Rue Saint-Jean, Place Royal and Petit-Champlain?

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Englands Great West Way follows the ancient path from London to Bristol. We take the train & get curious at stops along the way: Stonehenge, Baths masonic architecture, the Roman Baths, the S.S. Great Britain, sample some curious pub pies, learn some cockney rhyming slang, and visit some charming villages too.

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Why is La Grande-Place so gilded? How did Brussels chocolate legacy begin? Where can you walk through the pages of a comic book? How did Flanders become such a source of Master artists?

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Why is there a giant wall in the middle of Cardiff? Who built Cardiff Castle? And Coch Castle? Why does Cardiff have so many Victorian and Georgian arcades? What is a bara brith? programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: How did Manchester kick-start Railway Mania in the Industrial Age? What is Manchesters Water Palace? What is so curious about the architecture of the John Rylands and Chethams Libraries? Why is a bee the symbol of Manchester? Which pub owner shooed her patrons out with a broom? Why is the National Football Museum in Manchester?

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: How did Hong Kong get its name? What is so junk-y about a junk boat? Get curious about the Big Buddha, the Po Lin Monastery, and the Wisdom Path on Lantau Island. Then, the Kung Wo Tofu Factory, to learn the centuries-old tofu-making technique. We also take you inside a Tin Hau Temple, the Man Mo Temple, and a traditional Qipao dress-making shop.

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: We get curious about the stunning natural landscape of Wales. We visit Brecon Beacons National Park, Pembrokeshire National Park, St. Davids (the smallest city in Britain), Hay-onWye (WalesTown of Books), the Victorian seaside resort town of Tenby, and lots and lots of curious castles.

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Why did the English choose Jamestown, Yorktown and Williamsburg, Virginia as their early American settlements? Why did King William III and Queen Mary II establish a university here? What was life like for the colonists here? What crazy concoctions are to be found in a colonial apothecary?
